short_description: Port 12 on SW-U10 not working — web server WEB-01 unreachable
description: Monitoring shows link down on SW-U10 port 12 since 09:00. WEB-01 (10.10.4.100) cannot be reached. Need physical verification of port 12 cabling and downstream path to SRV-U01 via PP-U08.

cmdb.port_short_description: admin=up oper=DOWN speed=1G duplex=full vlan=10 mode=access stp=disabled cable_id=C-0142 cable_type=Cat6a cable_length=2m
